reviews.text: We went to Ranjani for a family (including our doggos) & pregnancy photo session!  We had 3 dogs, 2 of them puppies and full of energy, and Ranjani was amazing at corralling the their energy to capture some truly amazing photos.  She has a gift for allowing the dogs to be dogs, and capturing their spirit, not to mention getting them to be still for just moments to snap the shot! The whole experience was worth every bit of what we invested into it!  The images are timeless and will be something we can cherish forever!   I would highly recommend Ranjani if you are looking for amazing Black and White art of your family!  We will certainly be going back for future sessions to capture more memories with our family!

I have worked with Ranjani on a month-long photojournalism project in Mexico and I recently employed her services for my engagement photos. As both a colleague and a hired photographer, Ranjani is a consummate professional, generous with time, and extremely talented. She is incredibly easy to work with, goes above and beyond to to overcome unexpected hurdles, and on top of all of that is gracious, compassionate, and a joy to be around. I can’t imagine anyone else I’d go to first for photos of any kind!

Working with Ranjani is the best photo experience you can imagine! I saw her work online and loved her black and white expertise. I decided to do a fun photo shoot with my dogs, more so to meet Ranjani and see if she might be a good fit for some other professional projects I have upcoming. I'm SO glad I did, because not only do I have the most amazing forever memories with my dogs now, but I'm excited to schedule a business photo shoot for my business's website. If you've ever debating getting professional photos done, debate no more! Schedule a session with Ranjani, be ready to have some fun in the photography process, and enjoy looking at the best photos you'll ever get. You'll walk in thinking you'd be ok with paying for only a few photos, but once you see Ranjani's vision come to life, you'll want to leave with every photo!

Ranjani is amazing! Her work is very high quality and her studio is beautiful! She makes you and your pup feel comfortable. Ranjani did a great job of getting photos of me and my dog Duke, who was a bit timid around the flash. I love my photos and will treasure these for years to come! I highly recommend Ranjani!

Ranjani performed our elopement session. Everything about the experience was positive! She planned a whole itinerary, locations and put so much time into research even before the elopement. The images were literal perfection and we couldn’t have asked for better!
